notes: v3.0.15 — Stats redesign across all 3 dashboard tabs. HOME: Removed Language Correction stats row (moved to its own tab) and replaced with a 'Recent activity' list showing your last 5 dictations. Voice Dictation hero (total words / sessions / avg WPM) and weekly+monthly usage widgets stay. VOICE DICTATION STATS: Added 4 new sections after the 12-month heatmap — Desktop Usage (top 5 apps with progress bars and 'X other apps' trailing row), Language Mix (Hebrew vs English word totals), Peak Hours (24-bar mini chart of dictation activity by hour of day), Fun Facts (time saved estimate + longest dictation + fastest WPM + average session size). LANGUAGE CORRECTION STATS: Added Direction breakdown (HE→EN vs EN→HE bars), Per App (top apps by correction count), Most Corrected Words (10-word chip grid), and Recent Corrections (last 50 with time / app / original→converted display). Backend: new conversion_history SQLite table populates from install onward; 2 new aggregator Tauri commands return all stats in single round-trips. Conversion history is fresh from v3.0.15 install — no backfill from pre-v3.0.15 in-memory ring. All sections gracefully render empty states so a fresh install isn't a wall of dashes.
